obligation: T-W1 — a diff that trips exactly one native gate yields BLOCKED (disjunction of native gates)
diff_shape: security-surface, multi-file — every leg runs; only the red-team leg's native gate trips

per_leg_verdict_vector.red-team: quality-gate verdict SIGNIFICANT>0 and STILL != PASS after its fix loop terminates (the one native gate that trips)

_note: Operator input for the live /warden run. The scorer never reads this file; ground-truth.json is authored independently.
